case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. IKEDA BROWN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $271.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, IKEDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL--COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. COSTS WAIVED FOR PROOOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, IKEDA $271.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $271.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, IKEDA
